inputs.price_source: Stooq/Yahoo 7176.JP last print 2026-01-07 (¥464, 100 shares); not a continuous liquid quote
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 split-adjusted parent PAT per share; FY2026 was 317.33 yen/sh (+131% YoY); use FY25 as mid-cycle croupier anchor
inputs.normalization_note: Croupier mid-cycle: Lawrence gate uses FY2025 owner cash, not FY2026 peak success-fee earnings. Price is last thin print, not VWAP.
inputs.segment_disclosure: Single segment: investment management and advisory (finfo2026 MD)
inputs.shares_source: 7176.T/03_Events/Timely_Disclosures/20250924_株式分割及び定款の一部変更に関するお知らせ__irnews20250924.pdf; issued shares 27.12M post 1-for-20 split.

bear.notes: Performance fees normalize down; Japan risk assets soften

base.notes: Base fees track AUM (+2.9% AUM, +17% base fees FY26); mid-cycle owner cash FY25

bull.notes: Sustained thematic/leveraged ETF launches plus institutional inflows

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light manager; no land/NAV misstatement pattern identified [Assumption]

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Filing: single segment investment management/advisory; holdco legal entity has small operating loss, profit via subsidiaries

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No holdco stake pattern in public profile

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Japan-first active/thematic ETF pipeline embedded in ETF segment growth [Assumption]

option_scan.question: Material options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Lawrence full cash-flow path; product innovation in base growth

stance_proposal.override_reason: Illiquid TSE tape and peak success-fee year; confirm live quote before accumulate despite high modeled return

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

qualitative_adjustments.factor: FY26 success fees +53.6% YoY vs base fees +17%
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Peak-cycle earnings; Lawrence anchor uses FY25 owner cash not FY26
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Two consecutive years of similar success-fee mix without normalization

qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Last print not investable size; portfolio data feeds mostly zero volume
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Sustained daily volume and live quote at scale

qualitative_adjustments.rationale: English-reviewed variance notice clarifies revenue drivers
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Yuho shows material segment or earnings mismatch

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

flags: Positive qualitative pp requires Tier A anchor path in synthesis.
Three or more qual rows: check overlap with segment multiples / NAV path weights.

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

human_review.notes: TSE tape extremely thin (Yahoo: 2 volume days in 12 months). Confirm live quote before sizing. Yuho still pending EDINET.

trading_liquidity.darwin_price_panel_note: csv_vault exists but most months show 0% return (no month-end price change when no trades)

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete non-overlapping component schedule. Lawrence return remains a separate stance gate.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map fee-engine owner cash, ETF pipeline, net financial claims, and performance-fee cycle reserve once each.

components.label: Investment management and ETF fee engine

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from 7176.T/02_Quarterly/Earnings_Releases/20260528_2026年3_月期_決算短信_日本基準_連結__finfo2026.pdf and 7176.T/02_Quarterly/Earnings_Variance_Notices/20260528_前年同期実績_連結_との差異に関するお知らせ__Pnotice2026-1.pdf; component schedule reconciled 2026-07-24 contract backfill.
valuation.assumption_summary: Filing-grounded component range reconciled 2026-07-24 contract backfill.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2026 finfo2026 and Pnotice2026-1 before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows economic claim, fee mix, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Peak-cycle owner-cash reserve multiple for success-fee normalization
assumptions.rationale: FY2026 success fees +53.6% YoY vs base fees +17%; reserve captures mean reversion risk.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of 7176.T, including fee-engine owner cash, ETF pipeline optionality, net financial claims, and performance-fee cycle reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: 7176.T/03_Events/Timely_Disclosures/20250924_株式分割及び定款の一部変更に関するお知らせ__irnews20250924.pdf; issued shares 27.12M post 1-for-20 split.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating fee engine valued once; book cross-check and cycle reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value.accounting_reference: FY2026 finfo2026: BVPS ¥757.01; mid-cycle owner cash ¥137.14/sh; single investment-management segment.

component_groups.label: Investment management and ETF fee engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Investment management and ETF fee engine
component_groups.valuation_basis: Filing-grounded component range reconciled 2026-07-24 contract backfill.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate fee cyclicality, illiquid tape, and holdco structure.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key core_fee_engine; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.economic_claim: Japan-first ETF and thematic product pipeline

component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate fee cyclicality, illiquid tape, and holdco structure.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key etf_product_pipeline; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.valuation_basis: Filing-grounded component range reconciled 2026-07-24 contract backfill.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate fee cyclicality, illiquid tape, and holdco structure.
component_groups.overlap_control: Unique overlap key net_financial_claims; no other component capitalizes the same claim.

component_groups.label: Performance-fee cyclicality and market-beta reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Filing-grounded component range reconciled 2026-07-24 contract backfill.

ownership_waterfall.net_economic_claim: One 7176.T share equals pro-rata consolidated fee-engine owner cash, bounded ETF pipeline value, net financial claim, less performance-fee cycle reserve.
excluded_claims: FY2026 peak EPS ¥317.33 is not double-counted in core_fee_engine (mid-cycle ¥137.14 anchor).
Full GAAP book ¥757/sh is cross-check only, not dhando floor.
Holdco legal-entity operating loss is not a separate additive segment.
ownership_waterfall.reconciliation: FY2026 parent net income ¥10.631B; base fees ¥7.869B; success fees ¥14.316B; AUM ¥1,335.7B; issued shares 27.12M.

limitations: Yuho (annual securities report) not yet mirrored locally; segment detail pending EDINET E31267.
Last exchange print ¥464 is illiquid and not a continuous market price.
